name: Wikipedia Importer
description: Wikipedia Importer fetches a Wikipedia article and drops it into a new or existing note in your vault as tidy Markdown: every Wikipedia link becomes an internal [[wikilink]], equations become Obsidian-rendered LaTeX (WIP), images and animated gifs come through, and most of the clutter is stripped away. What you're left with is a readable, navigable note that plugs straight into your knowledge graph and Vault.
author: Concomitant
